#[derive(Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash)]
enum Route {
    Users,
    Orders,
    Products,
}

fn configure_routes() -> [Box<dyn Fn() -> String>; 3] {
    // GOOD: enum keys avoid String allocation for finite domain
    [
        Box::new(|| "users".to_string()),
        Box::new(|| "orders".to_string()),
        Box::new(|| "products".to_string()),
    ]
}
